key_facts: The SRV FPC sensor offers a long, customizable insertion length.
The insertion length for the SRV FPC sensor must be any length larger than 55.7 mm.
Customers must specify the norm, size, and pressure rating for the flange/adapter.
The wetted surfaces of the sensor are made from Material 316L.
Rheonics provides inline process density and viscosity monitoring solutions.
The sensor's overall body diameter is 30 mm (1.18 inch).
The sensor's tip diameter is 8 mm (0.31 inch).
